nasb.text: All do not have gifts of healings, do they? All do not speak with tongues, do they? All do not interpret, do they?

esv.text: Do all possess gifts of healing? Do all speak with tongues? Do all interpret?

cnv.text: 都是有醫病恩賜的嗎？都是說方言的嗎？都是翻譯方言的嗎？

ccb.text: 都有医病的恩赐吗？都懂得说方言吗？都会翻译方言吗？

csbs.text: 都有使人痊愈的恩赐吗？都说殊言吗？ 都翻译殊言吗？
